title: Biodiversity
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text: Biodiversity refers to the incredible (0) of life on Earth, from microscopic bacteria to giant whales. Scientists estimate that there are between eight and ten million species on our planet, though only a fraction have been formally identified. This diversity is not evenly distributed; tropical rainforests and coral reefs are particularly (1) in species, while deserts and polar regions support fewer forms of life. Biodiversity matters because every species plays a (2) in its ecosystem, contributing to processes that humans depend on for survival. Plants produce the oxygen we breathe and provide the (3) materials for countless medicines. Insects pollinate crops that feed billions of people. Wetlands filter our water and protect coastal areas from storms. Unfortunately, biodiversity is declining at an alarming (4), with species disappearing faster than at any time since the dinosaurs. The main causes are habitat destruction, climate change, pollution, and overexploitation of natural resources. Conservation efforts are (5) way around the world, with protected areas being established and endangered species being bred in captivity. However, experts argue that more fundamental changes are needed, including transforming how we produce food and consume resources. The (6) are high: if we fail to protect biodiversity, we risk undermining the natural systems that (7) life on Earth possible. It is not just about saving individual species but about preserving the complex web of relationships that (8) our planet healthy.

example.explanation: 'Variety of life' es la colocación correcta para describir la diversidad de seres vivos.

questions.explanation: 'Rich in species' es la colocación correcta para describir áreas con gran diversidad biológica.
'Plays a role' es una colocación fija para indicar que algo tiene una función importante.
'Raw materials' es la expresión correcta para referirse a materias primas.
'At an alarming rate' es la expresión fija para describir algo que ocurre a una velocidad preocupante.
'Under way' es la expresión correcta para indicar que algo está en progreso.
'The stakes are high' es una expresión fija que indica que hay mucho en juego.
'Make possible' es la colocación correcta para expresar que algo permite que otra cosa ocurra.
'Keep healthy' es la colocación correcta para expresar mantener algo en buen estado.
